name: TIMBERLAND BANCORP INC
summary: Timberland Bancorp, Inc. is a Washington-based bank holding company for Timberland Bank, a community bank founded in 1915. The Bank offers a full range of lending and deposit services across six Washington counties through 23 branches. Lending focuses on real estate mortgage loans including residential and commercial construction, one-to-four family residential, multi-family, commercial real estate, land loans, commercial business loans, and consumer loans.

products.name: One-to-Four Family Residential Loans
products.description: Mortgage loans secured by one-to-four family residential real estate properties.

products.name: Commercial Real Estate Loans
products.description: Loans secured by commercial and multi-family real estate properties.

products.name: Residential and Commercial Construction Loans
products.description: Construction financing for residential and commercial/multi-family projects.

products.name: Land Loans
products.description: Loans secured by land in the Bank's primary market areas.

products.name: Commercial Business Loans
products.description: Loans to businesses for commercial purposes.

products.name: Consumer Loans
products.description: Various consumer lending products offered to retail customers.

products.name: Deposit Services
products.description: Full range of savings and deposit products for retail and business customers.

products.name: Bank Owned Life Insurance
products.description: Life insurance products owned by the Bank as an investment vehicle.

partnerships.description: Member since 1937, providing access to funding and liquidity resources.
